# freeipa_host (Resource)

Manages FreeIPA hosts.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fqdn` (String) Fully Qualified Domain Name of the host.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the host.
- `force` (Boolean) Force host addition even if DNS verification fails.
- `ip_address` (String) IP address to associate with the host in DNS.
- `locality` (String) Locality of the host.
- `location` (String) Location of the host.
- `mac_address` (String) MAC address of the host.
- `managed_by` (Set of String) Set of host FQDNs that can manage this host.
- `os` (String) Operating system and version of the host.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) One-Time Password (OTP) generated to join the realm, or user-defined password.
- `platform` (String) Hardware platform of the host.
- `ssh_public_keys` (List of String) List of SSH public keys.
- `user_certificate` (String) Base-64 encoded host certificate.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique FQDN identifying the host.
